narrative:
Troy-Combined township has 796 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.0 percentage points.
